title: gorege rule engine configuration
description: Schema for gorege Config (loader.go). Validates structure only; semantic checks (dead/shadow rules, unknown dimension values) run at engine construction.

name.description: Dimension name; empty or omitted = anonymous (DimValues).

values.description: Declared values. Empty array means 'any string accepted at this slot' (loader.go semantics).

action.description: Case-sensitive; loader rejects other values with 'invalid action'.

name.description: Optional human-readable rule name; surfaces in Explanation.RuleName and warnings.

conditions.description: One matcher per dimension, in declaration order. Shorter arrays implicitly wildcard trailing dimensions.

oneOf.description: Exact value, or '*' (with optional surrounding whitespace) for Wildcard.
AnyOf list; matches if input equals any element.
